text: Surrounded by glass, neon, and the hum of technological promise, my thoughts echo the repetition I hear: yeah, yeah, yeah. The repetition resonates strangely in this R&D showcase, where every surface seems to promise innovation yet feels distant. I feel hopeful but also a little anxious—am I merely observing progress, or am I part of it? This space invites curiosity, but also asks: what does it mean to truly respond and develop, as a human?
